messages.content: ok kind of a funny coincidence, i keep seeing this one little cafe pop up everywhere this week

Funny how that happens — once something catches your attention, it starts appearing everywhere.

What draws you to it?
like a friend mentioned it, then i walked past it, then it was in a show i was watching. three times
Three times in a week does feel like the universe nudging you. What's your instinct — curious enough to actually go?
feels like the universe is nudging me to finally go check it out lol. i'm a little superstitious like that

That kind of superstition can be a useful nudge — sometimes it's just permission you were already looking for.

What's been stopping you from going before now?
i know it's just my brain noticing the same thing more, but it's a fun excuse to try a new spot

That's a nice way to hold it — you know what it is, and you still let it be a little magical. Best of both worlds.

Is there something that makes trying new places feel like it needs an excuse?
gonna go this weekend and get whatever their signature drink is. small adventures, you know
Small adventures are underrated. There's something good about having a concrete little thing to look forward to.
